---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Hyperion
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

```python
# Minimal code to reproduce
import asyncio
from hyperion import HyperionEngine, ModelRouter

async def main():
    engine = HyperionEngine(router=ModelRouter())
    # ...
```

## 🤔 Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## 😱 Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## 🖥️ Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Python version**: [e.g. 3.11.5]
- **Hyperion version**: [e.g. 2.0.0]
- **LLM backend**: [e.g. openrouter, openai, ollama]
- **Model**: [e.g. openrouter/auto, gpt-4o]

## 📎 Additional Context

- Error message / traceback
- Logs (if any)
- Screenshots (if applicable)

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues
- [ ] I have updated to the latest version
- [ ] I have included a minimal reproducible example
